ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "application_area" TEXT /* Application area of the model (e.g., image classification) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Model version number */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used to implement the model */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the model's repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model being evaluated */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model in the evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model in the evaluation */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model in the evaluation */,
  "predicted_tile" REAL /* Predicted tile size from the evaluation */,
  "total_size" REAL /* Total size of the input data used in the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the evaluation (e.g., any issues encountered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event (e.g., any issues encountered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., publicly available, custom) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_data_sets" (
  "model_data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of model-dataset association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "used_for_training" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset was used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sets_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "evaluation_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
